retry_reason: Failure occurs either due to missing attribute (same message will always lack it) or device not found (device must exist for a retry to succeed, but typical netlink operations are one-shot).
contract_summary: This function extracts the mesh interface index from a generic netlink info structure and returns a reference-counted net_device pointer. It is a get-wrapper that acquires a reference on the net_device identified by the given ifindex. The caller must release the reference by calling dev_put() (or equivalent) when done with the device. The call fails with an ERR_PTR if the attribute is missing or if the device does not exist; callers must check the return value for errors before using the returned pointer.
